title: Supreme Court refuses to entertain plea challenging forest clearances for Adani coal mining project in MP
description: The Supreme Court on Thursday refused to entertain an appeal challenging the National Green Tribunal’s (NGT) decision to reject a plea against environmental clearances granted for an Adani-linked coal mining project in Madhya Pradesh’s Singrauli forest area, part of which is claimed to fall within an elephant corridor [Ajay Dubey vs. Union of India & Ors.]. A Bench of Justices PS Narasimha and Alok Aradhe said that it was not inclined to examine the merits of the environm
